description_long: This object is a compact, boxy handgun with a utilitarian, industrial appearance, featuring a matte black metal finish and minimal embellishments. The frame and slide are constructed from dark, slightly weathered metal, with visible screws and panel lines along the sides. The grip is angular and robust, with a slightly textured surface and a protruding magazine base that appears to be capped with a lighter-colored, possibly polymer or metal, floorplate. The barrel is short and cylindrical, extending slightly from the front of the slide, and is finished in a lighter metallic color. A single cartridge is positioned near the grip in several views, providing a sense of scale and context. The overall design is functional, with no visible manufacturer markings or decorative engravings, emphasizing practicality over aesthetics.
description: A compact, boxy black handgun with a short metallic barrel, angular grip, and utilitarian design. The surface is matte and slightly weathered, with a protruding magazine base and minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handgun, the angular grip, and the protruding magazine base with a cartridge nearby.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the grip, the back of the slide, and the cartridge placed behind the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same boxy profile, grip, and magazine base, with the barrel slightly visible at the front.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the short, cylindrical barrel opening and the cartridge positioned in front of the muzzle.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and robust, with a slightly blocky contour and a matte, dark finish. Its surface appears to have a subtle texture for improved handling, though no pronounced checkering or stippling is visible. The base of the grip is capped with a lighter-colored, possibly metallic or polymer floorplate, and there are no visible logos, finger grooves, or decorative embellishments. The overall design prioritizes function and durability, with a utilitarian aesthetic.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and rectangular, with a squared-off profile and no visible undercuts or curvature. It is solid and unadorned, lacking any texturing or reinforcement, and appears to be integrated directly into the frame for structural strength. The design is simple and practical, with no distinctive features or accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front of the slide. It has a smooth, metallic finish and appears to be of standard profile, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator attachments. The exterior is plain, with no markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and matte, with only panel lines and screws providing visual detail.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, with a lighter color that contrasts with the dark grip. It is rectangular in shape and appears to be made of metal or polymer, with no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing. The design is straightforward and functional.
